payload.answer: Admin SQL select-only mode permits read-only SELECT access, e.g. `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10`, and denies destructive DELETE operations, e.g. `DELETE FROM memory_cards`.
citations: Input: "Admin SQL select-only mode: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied."

entity_resolution.reason: No prior entity is provided; the input states a specific access-policy fact suitable for a new policy memory.

memory_cards.statement: In admin SQL select-only mode, SELECT queries are allowed and DELETE queries are denied.

details: Captured the explicit permission boundary from the input.
Stored only the stated allow/deny facts without inferring broader database capabilities.
Did not present any unstated or superseded permissions as current.

repair_options: If this permission is session-only or test-only, mark it as ephemeral instead of durable memory.
If permissions vary by table or role, store a narrower scoped rule naming the exact role, database, and table.
If additional SQL operations are known (e.g. UPDATE, INSERT), record them explicitly rather than inferring from select-only wording.
